prompt_text:
### Demographics: 61-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 15 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after elevated fasting glucose on routine screening
Current symptoms: Rare nocturnal hypoglycemia (1 episode in 3 months); no DKA/HHS signs; Intermittent GI discomfort (nausea/bloating)

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3b (30-44)
MASH
Body mass index category: Overweight
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3b (30-44); HF (No); ASCVD (No); MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Overweight
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (maternal grandmother)
- Social history: Current smoker (15 cigarettes/day for 15 years; ~11.2 pack-years); Alcohol 3-4 drinks/week (2-3 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 500mg twice daily; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 79.7 kg; Height 181.8 cm; BMI 24.1 kg/m²; Blood pressure 128/81 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.7%; 9 months ago 8.0%; 6 months ago 7.5%; 3 months ago 7.0%; current 6.3%), FPG (12 months ago 234mg/dL; 9 months ago 218mg/dL; 6 months ago 186mg/dL; 3 months ago 161mg/dL; current 121mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 78.9kg; 9 months ago 77.2kg; 6 months ago 77.2kg; 3 months ago 74.9kg; current 79.7kg), Height (12 months ago 181.8cm; 9 months ago 181.8cm; 6 months ago 181.8cm; 3 months ago 181.8cm; current 181.8cm), BMI (12 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 23.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 23.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 23.0kg/m²; current 24.1kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 127mmHg; 9 months ago 124mmHg; 6 months ago 130mmHg; 3 months ago 128mmHg; current 128mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 85mmHg; 9 months ago 82mmHg; 6 months ago 85mmHg; 3 months ago 83mmHg; current 81mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 66U/L; 9 months ago 71U/L; 6 months ago 68U/L; 3 months ago 66U/L; current 67U/L), AST (12 months ago 73U/L; 9 months ago 76U/L; 6 months ago 75U/L; 3 months ago 65U/L; current 75U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.2mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.0mg/dL; current 1.0mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 40mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 38mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 39mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 36mL/min/1.73m²; current 37mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 74mg/g; 9 months ago 68mg/g; 6 months ago 87mg/g; 3 months ago 62mg/g; current 76mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 81mg/dL; 9 months ago 88mg/dL; 6 months ago 81mg/dL; 3 months ago 81mg/dL; current 84mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 43mg/dL; 9 months ago 42mg/dL; 6 months ago 46mg/dL; 3 months ago 42mg/dL; current 44mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 147mg/dL; 9 months ago 130mg/dL; 6 months ago 135mg/dL; 3 months ago 136mg/dL; current 141mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 12.8g/dL; 6 months ago 13.0g/dL; 3 months ago 13.0g/dL; current 12.1g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
